package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_handler_without_csrf_protection: POST/PUT/DELETE handler registration without evidence of CSRF token middleware
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario719Positive(mux *http.ServeMux) {
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /transfer", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) { w.WriteHeader(http.StatusAccepted) })
}
